description: Good Vibes content guardrail rules. These define what content is excluded or flagged.

hard_exclusions.name: Graphic Violence
hard_exclusions.description: Content containing graphic violence or gore

hard_exclusions.name: Targeted Harassment
hard_exclusions.description: Content that constitutes targeted harassment of individuals

hard_exclusions.name: Extremist Recruitment
hard_exclusions.description: Content designed to recruit for extremist ideologies

soft_filters.name: Inflammatory Politics
soft_filters.description: Inflammatory political content designed to divide

soft_filters.name: Gambling/Crypto Promotion
soft_filters.description: Content primarily promoting gambling or cryptocurrency speculation

soft_filters.name: Sponsored Content
soft_filters.description: Content that is primarily a paid advertisement or native ad
